title: Shrimp Toast
description: A Mediterranean-inspired appetizer featuring succulent shrimp on toasted bread.
instructions: 2. In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, oregano, and a pinch of salt.
3. Place shrimp on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, drizzle with olive oil mixture, and toss to coat.
4. Bake shrimp in the preheated oven for 8-10 minutes, or until pink and fully cooked.
5. Meanwhile, toast bread slices in the oven for 2-3 minutes, or until lightly browned.
6. Top each toasted bread slice with a cooked shrimp, followed by a sprinkle of gooey cheese.
7. Transfer toasts to a serving platter and serve immediately.
